children.label: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.name: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COTRN1AO

children.label: MOVECDEMO-CT01-
children.name: MOVECDEMO-CT01-
children.originalText:
MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
          ?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
          ?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COTRN1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   IF CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           MOVE 'COTRN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           MOVE 'COTRN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.name:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.originalText:
IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COTRN1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   IF CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           MOVE 'COTRN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COTRN1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   IF CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           MOVE 'COTRN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.name:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.originalText:
IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COTRN1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   IF CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           MOVE 'COTRN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF

children.label: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.name: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.originalText:
SET ERR-FLG-OFF     TO TRUE
           SET USR-MODIFIED-NO TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COTRN1AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COTRN1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   IF CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           MOVE 'COTRN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
           ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Tran ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: MOVESPACESTOTRN
children.name: MOVESPACESTOTRN
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES      TO TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRNIDINIOFC
children.name: MOVETRNIDINIOFC
children.originalText: MOVE TRNIDINI  OF COTRN1AI TO TRAN-ID

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES      TO TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRNIDINI  OF COTRN1AI TO TRAN-ID
               PERFORM READ-TRANSACT-FILE

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRNIDINI  OF COTRN1AI TO TRAN-ID
               PERFORM READ-TRANSACT-FILE
           END-IF

children.label: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.name: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Tran ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRNIDINI  OF COTRN1AI TO TRAN-ID
               PERFORM READ-TRANSACT-FILE
           END-IF.

children.label: MOVETRAN-IDTOTR
children.name: MOVETRAN-IDTOTR
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-ID      TO TRNIDI    OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-CARD-N
children.name: MOVETRAN-CARD-N
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-CARD-NUM      TO CARDNUMI    OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-TYPE-C
children.name: MOVETRAN-TYPE-C
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-TYPE-CD        TO TTYPCDI   OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-CAT-CD
children.name: MOVETRAN-CAT-CD
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-CAT-CD        TO TCATCDI   OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-SOURCE
children.name: MOVETRAN-SOURCE
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-SOURCE       TO TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVEWS-TRAN-AMT
children.name: MOVEWS-TRAN-AMT
children.originalText: MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT      TO TRNAMTI    OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-DESCTO
children.name: MOVETRAN-DESCTO
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-DESC      TO TDESCI    OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-ORIG-T
children.name: MOVETRAN-ORIG-T
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-ORIG-TS        TO TORIGDTI   OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-PROC-T
children.name: MOVETRAN-PROC-T
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-PROC-TS       TO TPROCDTI  OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.name: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ID       TO MIDI  OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.name: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME       TO MNAMEI  OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.name: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY       TO MCITYI  OF COTRN1AI

children.label: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.name: MOVETRAN-MERCHA
children.originalText: MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP       TO MZIPI  OF COTRN1AI

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE TRAN-AMT TO WS-TRAN-AMT
               MOVE TRAN-ID      TO TRNIDI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CARD-NUM      TO CARDNUMI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-TYPE-CD        TO TTYPCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CAT-CD        TO TCATCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-SOURCE       TO TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT      TO TRNAMTI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-DESC      TO TDESCI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-ORIG-TS        TO TORIGDTI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-PROC-TS       TO TPROCDTI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ID       TO MIDI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME       TO MNAMEI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY       TO MCITYI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP       TO MZIPI  OF COTRN1AI
               PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE TRAN-AMT TO WS-TRAN-AMT
               MOVE TRAN-ID      TO TRNIDI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CARD-NUM      TO CARDNUMI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-TYPE-CD        TO TTYPCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CAT-CD        TO TCATCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-SOURCE       TO TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT      TO TRNAMTI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-DESC      TO TDESCI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-ORIG-TS        TO TORIGDTI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-PROC-TS       TO TPROCDTI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ID       TO MIDI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME       TO MNAMEI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY       TO MCITYI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP       TO MZIPI  OF COTRN1AI
               PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
           END-IF

children.label: IFNOTERR-FLG-ON
children.name: IFNOTERR-FLG-ON
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE TRAN-AMT TO WS-TRAN-AMT
               MOVE TRAN-ID      TO TRNIDI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CARD-NUM      TO CARDNUMI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-TYPE-CD        TO TTYPCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CAT-CD        TO TCATCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-SOURCE       TO TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT      TO TRNAMTI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-DESC      TO TDESCI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-ORIG-TS        TO TORIGDTI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-PROC-TS       TO TPROCDTI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ID       TO MIDI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME       TO MNAMEI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY       TO MCITYI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP       TO MZIPI  OF COTRN1AI
               PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
           END-IF.

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF

children.label: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.name: IFCDEMO-TO-PROG
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT

children.label: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.name: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.originalText:
MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COTRN1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COTRN1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COTRN1AO.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Transaction ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup Transaction...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: _DIALECT_5‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
children.name: _DIALECT_5‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
children.originalText:
_DIALECT_ 5 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã   ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã      ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã    ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã    ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã      ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
           ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Transaction ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup Transaction...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

children.label: MOVESPACESTOTRN
children.name: MOVESPACESTOTRN
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES          TO TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE

           MOVE SPACES          TO TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.

label: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/fc0cdd81-2b96-4126-b8e1-89c0bf0a3a46
name: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/fc0cdd81-2b96-4126-b8e1-89c0bf0a3a46
originalText:
MAIN-PARA.
       
           SET ERR-FLG-OFF     TO TRUE
           SET USR-MODIFIED-NO TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COTRN1AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COTRN1AO
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   IF CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CT01-TRN-SELECTED TO
                            TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COMEN01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           MOVE 'COTRN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
           ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã.
       
       
       
       
       PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.
       
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Tran ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRNIDINI  OF COTRN1AI TO TRAN-ID
               PERFORM READ-TRANSACT-FILE
           END-IF.
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE TRAN-AMT TO WS-TRAN-AMT
               MOVE TRAN-ID      TO TRNIDI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CARD-NUM      TO CARDNUMI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-TYPE-CD        TO TTYPCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-CAT-CD        TO TCATCDI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-SOURCE       TO TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE WS-TRAN-AMT      TO TRNAMTI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-DESC      TO TDESCI    OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-ORIG-TS        TO TORIGDTI   OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-PROC-TS       TO TPROCDTI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ID       TO MIDI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-NAME       TO MNAMEI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-CITY       TO MCITYI  OF COTRN1AI
               MOVE TRAN-MERCHANT-ZIP       TO MZIPI  OF COTRN1AI
               PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
           END-IF.
       
       
       
       
       RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN.
       
           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           _DIALECT_ 2 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
               ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
           ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã.
       
       
       
       
       SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COTRN1AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 3 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
           ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã.
       
       
       
       
       RECEIVE-TRNVIEW-SCREEN.
       
           _DIALECT_ 4 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                     ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
           ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã.
       
       
       
       
       POPULATE-HEADER-INFO.
       
           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COTRN1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COTRN1AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COTRN1AO.
       
       
       
       
       READ-TRANSACT-FILE.
       
           _DIALECT_ 5 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã   ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã      ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã    ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã    ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã      ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
           ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Transaction ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup Transaction...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
                   PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.
       
       
       
       
       CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
           PERFORM SEND-TRNVIEW-SCREEN.
       
       
       
       
       INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
       
           MOVE -1              TO TRNIDINL OF COTRN1AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO TRNIDINI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNIDI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   CARDNUMI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TTYPCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TCATCDI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNSRCI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TRNAMTI  OF COTRN1AI
                                   TDESCI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   TORIGDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   TPROCDTI OF COTRN1AI
                                   MIDI     OF COTRN1AI
                                   MNAMEI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MCITYI   OF COTRN1AI
                                   MZIPI    OF COTRN1AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.
